title: atractylodes lancea var. simplicifolia
intro: Atractylodes lancea var. simplicifolia, also known as Zingiberis asperifolia or simply Zingiber asperifolia, is a type of plant in the Atractylodes genus, which is native to the mountainous regions of China. The medicinal properties of Atractylodes lancea var. simplicifolia include its anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, alleviating colds and flu, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to regulate blood sugar levels and aid in digestive health. Atractylodes lancea var. simplicifolia is typically prepared as a decoction or tea, and its dried rhizomes can be used in herbal supplements and traditional Chinese medicine preparations.
